name: Mimolot Book Tariff Office
summary: Office managing book tariffs used to fund education and regulate knowledge access.
day_to_day: Assesses book tariffs, records exemptions, and monitors educational revenue.
who_works_there: Tariff clerks, archive officers, educational administrators, customs staff.
who_uses_it: Scholars, booksellers, students, travelers importing texts.
authority: Can levy tariffs, seize undeclared texts, and regulate educational exemptions.
public_manifestation: Tariff desks, stamped books, customs arguments, scholarship notices.
conflict_or_bottleneck: Knowledge funding and knowledge restriction are never emotionally neutral in a learned polity.
